# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

format_version: "1.1"

services:
- name: service1
  url: http://microservice1.internal:8000
  routes:
  - name: route1
    paths:
    - /endpoint1
  - name: route2
    paths:
    - /endpoint2

- name: service2
  url: http://microservice2.internal:8000
  routes:
  - name: route1
    paths:
    - /endpoint1
  - name: route2
    paths:
    - /endpoint2

upstreams:
- name: upstream1
  targets:
  - target: service1
    weight: 100
  - target: service2
    weight: 100
